Sweat Test for Cystic Fibrosis 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/sweat-test-for-cystic-fibrosis/ 
Sweat Test for Cystic Fibrosis 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a sweat test? 
A sweat test measures the amount of chloride in your sweat . Chloride is a type of electrolyte . Electrolytes are electrically charged minerals Â that help control the amount of fluids and the balance of acids and bases (pH balance) in your body. Chloride and sodium form the salt found in your sweat.
Normall
